notes: Reddit post; leads not sources — removed from references
RCT; combined selenium + CoQ10 reduced cardiovascular mortality 5.9% vs 12.6% in elderly over 5 years; published in Int J Cardiology
Comprehensive 2021 review of CoQ10 across cardiovascular, fertility, muscle health; notes bioavailability challenges; published in Antioxidants (Basel)
2014 review; shows antioxidant supplements have mixed results for lifespan extension; CoQ10 alone showed increased oxidative stress in yeast models; useful nuance on limits of supplementation
2025 meta-analysis of 45 RCTs; CoQ10 reduces systolic BP by mean 3.44 mmHg; lower dose (<200mg) and longer duration (>8 weeks) most effective; covers endothelial function mechanism
